compressed_prompt: I work in the marketing department and I need your help. I need a template for an advertisement for a new product which is a portable camera. In the template, capitalize a few words to stress main points. Please limit the number of words with all capital letters to less than four. Your response should contain at least ten sentences.
response: Introducing the REVOLUTIONARY Portable Camera! Capture LIFE'S Moments with EASE. Compact Design, High-Quality Images. Perfect for TRAVEL, ADVENTURES, and Everyday Use. Effortless Setup, Instant Sharing. Experience the Joy of Photography Like Never Before. LIMITED TIME OFFER: Get Yours Now and Enjoy Exclusive DISCOUNTS. Don't Miss Out on this GAME-CHANGING Device. Order Today and Elevate Your Photography Experience. Join the PORTABLE CAMERA REVOLUTION!
